description:
Whole-program call-site observation in the typer.

Problem: self-recursive fns with var-bound params (count(n, acc), fact(n)) typed as (any,…) → any, falling out of JIT/AOT eligibility because derive_lowerty rejects any.

Fix: per-fn-name accumulate union of arg types across all observed call sites; on next iteration intersect each clause's narrowed_args with the obs. Two-pass within type_function: exit clauses first, then self-recursive clauses under a snapshot where self has return narrowed to the union of exit-clause returns. Guarded clauses no longer subtract from prior_inputs (so a wildcard catch-all after a guard stays reachable).

Shipped: commit 0a02092.
title: Typer: call-site observation for recursive/multi-clause monomorphization
